zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon於1299年11月2日出生在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里時，他的父親James II of Aragon House of Barcelona32歲，母親Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón19歲。他於1314年與Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達萊里達結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1336年1月24日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年36歲，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達萊里達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon于1299年11月2日出生在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里时，他的父亲James II of Aragon House of Barcelona32岁，母亲Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón19岁。他于1314年与Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達萊里達结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1336年1月24日在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿享年36岁，埋葬在西班牙卡塔倫亞萊里達萊里達。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aragon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Juan, Ruben, Fernando, Jesus, Julio, Luis, Raul, Mario, Alfonso.

Spanish (Aragón) and southern French: habitational name from Aragon, Spain, which was an independent kingdom from 1035 to 1479. It took its name from the river Aragón, which arises in its northwestern corner. The river name may be related to Basque (h)ara(n) ‘valley’; in Basque, Aragon is called Aragoa or Aragoi, which probably means ‘high valley’. Compare Deragon .

variants.name: Deragon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Pierre, Raoul, Rejean.

French: variant of Daragon, habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, denoting someone from Aragon, a region and medieval kingdom in Spain (see Aragon ), or a habitational name for someone from Aragon, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Deragon is very rare in France. Compare Dragon .

variants.name: Aragones
meanings: Spanish (Aragonés): habitational or ethnic name for someone from Aragon (see Aragon ).

variants.name: Aragona
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Ciro, Domenic, Domenico, Gaspare.  Spanish Carolina, Ninfa, Rosario.

Italian (mainly southern): habitational or ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Aragon (see   Aragon  ); the surname arrived in Italy in the wake of the Aragonese conquest and domination of southern Italy, which began in 1282.

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon was born on 2 November 1299, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy, his father, James II of Aragon House of Barcelona, was 32 and his mother, Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, was 19. He married Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager in 1314, in Lleida, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 January 1336, in Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain, at the age of 36, and was buried in Lleida, Lleida, Catalonia, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon est né le 2 novembre 1299, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie, son père, James II of Aragon House of Barcelona, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager en 1314, à Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1336, à Barcelona, Catalunya, Espagne, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon am 2. November 1299 in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater James II of Aragon House of Barcelona 32 und seine Mutter Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón 19. Er hat 1314 in Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. Januar 1336 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Barcelona, Catalunya, Spanien und wurde in Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon è nato il il 2 novembre 1299 nel Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, il suo padre, James II of Aragon House of Barcelona, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager nel 1314, nel Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 gennaio 1336, nel Barcelona, Catalunya, Spagna, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragonが1299年11月2日にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリで生まれた時，父James II of Aragon House of Barcelonaは32歳，母Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragónは19歳であった。1314年にスペインカタルニーアレイダレイダでDona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Agerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1336年1月24日にスペインカタルニーアバーセロナで36歳で死去し，スペインカタルニーアレイダレイダにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon(이)가 1299년 11월 2일 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James II of Aragon House of Barcelona(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1314년 스페인 카털니아 레이다 레이다에서 Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1336년 1월 24일 스페인 카털니아 바셀나에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카털니아 레이다 레이다에 묻혔다.

mn.02 Nov 1299–24 January 1336: 1299 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 2–1336 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 24

pt.02 Nov 1299–24 January 1336: 2 de novembro de 1299–24 de janeiro de 1336
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon nasceu em 2 de novembro de 1299, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália, seu pai, James II of Aragon House of Barcelona, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager em 1314, em Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1336, em Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Lleida, Lleida, Catalunya, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon родился 2 ноября 1299 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия, его отцу по имени James II of Aragon House of Barcelona было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager в 1314 г. в местности ллида, ллида, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 января 1336 г. в местности барселона, каталуня, Испания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности ллида, ллида, каталуня, Испания.

sm.desde 1314 hasta 1336: mai le 1314 e o'o I le 1336
sm.desde 1327 hasta 1336: mai le 1327 e o'o I le 1336

es.02 Nov 1299–24 January 1336: 2 de noviembre de 1299–24 de enero de 1336
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Don Alfonso IV de Aragon nació el 2 de noviembre de 1299, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia, su papá, James II of Aragon House of Barcelona, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Blanca d'Anjou Reina consorte de Aragón, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Dona Condesa Therese van Montpellier Gravin van Urgel en Ager en 1314, en Lleida, Lérida, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de enero de 1336, en Barcelona, Cataluña, España, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Lleida, Lérida, Cataluña, España.
